title: RC returns errors as HTTP 200 with JSON body
detail: Always read the body; never trust status code.

title: rc_update_row needs numeric column IDs
detail: 1=graphics,2=format,4=lastline,9=notes; string keys silently no-op; EstimatedDuration is the lone by-name exception.

title: isPlainText=false mandatory on saveScript
detail:
true HTML-escapes and converts \n\n to
, wrecking teleprompter.

title: lastline is a FORWARD cue (row N triggers row N+1)
detail: Last spoken line before the NEXT graphic; min 5 words (3 if complete sentence); chosen by topical relevance.

title: Frozen rundown silently blocks writes
detail: API returns success; nothing persists. Unfreeze in UI.

title: Template:1 / Archived flags trap rundown copies
detail: Copies inherit Template/Archived; sidebar hides them; archived copies resist edit. Set Template=0 / unarchive first.

title: createRundown 'Start/Date must be an integer' bug
detail: createRundown fails; copy a non-archived rundown then setRundownProperties.

title: rc_insert_row never populates on insert

title: RC read-after-write returns stale cache
detail: Verify in browser, not by immediate re-read.
